detail.description:
Welcome to Hamster Jump: Cake Tower

Get ready for one of the cutest and most satisfying stacking games you’ll ever play. Tap to make your adorable hamster jump, stack delicious cakes, and build the tallest sky-high tower you can imagine!

Jump & Stack Gameplay
Play with one hand using simple tap controls. Jump precisely and stack cakes to build the perfect tower.

Multiple Game Modes
Explore the hamster world and take on different challenges as you progress through the game.

Cute Outfits
Colle
